scripts.test: pnpm -r --if-present run test && pnpm run test:hermes
scripts.test:hermes: pnpm --filter @memlume/adapter-sdk build && node --test adapters/hermes/tests/bridge.test.mjs && python -m unittest discover -s adapters/hermes/tests -p test_*.py
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @memlume/adapter-sdk build && pnpm --filter @memlume/daemon build && pnpm --filter @memlume/daemon exec vitest --root ../.. run apps/daemon/test/shared-brain.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/adapter-contract.test.ts
